def find_user(users: list[dict], name: str) -> dict | None:
    name_cf = name.casefold()
    for user in users:
        if user["name"].casefold() == name_cf:
            return user
    return None


def filter_by_status(items: list[dict], status: str) -> list[dict]:
    status_cf = status.casefold()
    return [item for item in items if item["status"].casefold() == status_cf]


def match_permission(permissions: list[str], required: str) -> bool:
    required_cf = required.casefold()
    for perm in permissions:
        if perm.casefold() == required_cf:
            return True
    return False
